title: [Lirafyr Cottage, Garden]
description: Encircling this small outdoor area is a white picket fence, lining the exterior of the pale barrier are flowering hedges, offering a bit of privacy along with its sweet fragrance.  Standing like soldiers in each corner of the plot are two fruit trees, an apple tree and a fig tree with some oak planters following behind them.  Braced against the exterior wall of the house is a redwood garden lattice, allowing wisteria vines to climb upwards for their blooms to create a waterfall of whites, pinks, and purples.
